\p3This place kind of creeps me out...
\knightExcuse me! You four, may I speak with you?
\knightJust wondering... what's your business here in Greenfield?
\p2We're really just passing through... we're adventurers,
you see. We just got here from Adon.
\knightAdon, you say? Don't tell me... are you
\knightWow! It was just a guess... I heard the

\p3Yeah, we're here looking to investigate some rumors.
Who around here would know anything about a \c[18]demon king\c[0]?
\knight\c[18]Demon king\c[0]?! Well... there's not much in the
way of magic here in Greenfield. But I suppose
the mayor might have heard a rumor or two.
\knightLikely in his office. You can probably just walk in, but
don't bombard him with questions right off the bat. Come to
think of it, if you four could defeat Laeryidyean, I'm sure
you could offer your services in exchange for intel.
